Package in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.icdmap

Class Record

  • java.lang.Object
    • in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.icdmap.Record
  • public class Record
extends java.lang.Object
    Defines the data/structure to be provided as input diagnosis record. It has data members and corresponding getters and setters.
